DEPT. #1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. EXH #1-2 MARKED FOR ID & INTO EVID. PL. WIT. MR. SULLIVAN S&E. JUDGMENT FOR PL. WITH REST. PREMISES AT 30 ELGIN PARK, $6,038.60 R&D, $950.00 ATTY FEES, $162.00 COSTS. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOLEY, DENNIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 30 ELGIN PARK $6,038.60 RENT, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $162.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,150.60, LEASE FORFEITED, $250.00 SANCTIONS
